title: Strategy for Public Health Preparedness and Response to Artificial Intelligence Threats
latest_action: 2023-07-18: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary_text: Strategy for Public Health Preparedness and Response to Artificial Intelligence ThreatsThis bill requires the Department of Health and Human Services to develop a strategy for public health preparedness, response, and biodefense that addresses the risks to national health security posed by the misuse of artificial intelligence, such as biological weapons and viruses and bacteria that are resistant to treatment.

committees.name: Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions Committee

actions.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
